reviews.review_title: Dont know how to get to the maps
reviews.review_description: How do I get to the maps

Its Perfect its nice and I play this game every day.theres just one problem the maps are a little dark when I'm going to shop its to dark to see .and the maps are a little empty accept the shop the rest kinda reminds me of the backrooms and you need to make a horror mode anyway that's how I think.
